title: Marketplace Manager - Park Avenue - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Park Avenue - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Park Avenue in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Park Avenue:
Park Avenue is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue!
